title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
original_title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
overview: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who retired from the Air Force after being diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later went on to found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.
